zh.Widworthy Manor, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文維德沃希
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Wotton於1302年3月26日出生在英國戴文維德沃希時，他的父親John Byset Wotton40歲，母親Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark37歲。他和Engaret Dymark至少有3個兒子。他去世於1335年1月1日之前在英國。

zh-hans.Widworthy, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文維德沃希
zh-hans.Widworthy Manor, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文維德沃希
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Wotton于1302年3月26日出生在英国戴文維德沃希时，他的父亲John Byset Wotton40岁，母亲Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark37岁。他和Engaret Dymark至少有3个儿子。他去世于1335年1月1日之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wooten
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English wid(u), wudu ‘wood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Wootton in Northamptonshire or Oxfordshire, Wootton Bassett in Wiltshire, Wotton in Surrey, and Wotton under Edge in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Wotton was born on 26 March 1302, in Widworthy, Devon, England, his father, John Byset Wotton, was 40 and his mother, Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark, was 37. He had at least 3 sons with Engaret Dymark. He died before 1 January 1335, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Wotton est né le 26 mars 1302, à Widworthy, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Byset Wotton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Engaret Dymark. Il est décédé avant 1 janvier 1335, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Wotton am 26. März 1302 in Widworthy, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Byset Wotton 40 und seine Mutter Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark 37. Er hatte mit Engaret Dymark mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 1. Januar 1335 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Wotton è nato il il 26 marzo 1302 nel Widworthy, Devon, England, il suo padre, John Byset Wotton, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Engaret Dymark. Morì prima del 1 gennaio 1335, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Wottonが1302年3月26日にイギリスデボンウィドウオルシーで生まれた時，父John Byset Wottonは40歳，母Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymarkは37歳であった。彼はEngaret Dymarkとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1335年1月1日以前にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Wotton(이)가 1302년 3월 26일 영국 데폰 위드워시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Byset Wotton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Engaret Dymark(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1335년 1월 1일 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.26 March 1302–before 1 January 1335: 26 de março de 1302–antes 1 de janeiro de 1335
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Wotton nasceu em 26 de março de 1302, em Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Byset Wotton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Engaret Dymark. Ele faleceu antes 1 de janeiro de 1335, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Wotton родился 26 марта 1302 г. в местности видворти, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Byset Wotton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark, 37. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Engaret Dymark. Он умер перед 1 январь 1335 г. в местности Англия.

es.26 March 1302–before 1 January 1335: 26 de marzo de 1302–antes de 1 de enero de 1335
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Wotton nació el 26 de marzo de 1302, en Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Byset Wotton, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Engaret Dymark. Murió antes de 1 de enero de 1335, en Inglaterra.
